input.command:
curl -s -X POST "https://base-mainnet.g.alchemy.com/v2/oTgEqagb1skfZMORBdRso" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Origin: https://vie.dev" \
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"alchemy_getTokenBalances","params":["0xd8dA6BF26964aF9D7eEd9e03E53415D37aA96045","erc20"]}' 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); tb=d.get('result',{}).get('tokenBalances',[]); print(f'tokens: {len(tb)}'); [print(t['contractAddress'][:20], t['tokenBalance'][:10]) for t in tb[:3]]"
input.description: Test Alchemy token balances with vie.dev origin
